title: golden dandelion backport
description: adds the golden dandelion to older versions
body:
Craft the golden dandelion from minecraft 26.1 to older version

/!\ make sure to download the required resourcepack !!!

![golden_dandelion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da355f134eac6f56136ab9d32b9950d40c1ab46f.png)

you can craft the golden dandelion with a dandelion and 8 gold nuggets.

you can right click a baby mob to lock is age and keep it as a baby !

you can right click a locked baby to make it start aging again !
